data.body:
PASS 1 review — T10 (Infrastructure / IaC) [overlay]: NOT APPLICABLE.

This is a documentation-only ticket ("This is documentation only — no behavior changes") that adds an API reference doc under `docs/` plus an automated drift-check test (`tests/unit/test_reuse_surface_doc.py`). It provisions/configures no infrastructure — no cloud resources, no IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible), no Kubernetes/Helm — so the T10 overlay's state/IAM/idempotency/blast-radius/secrets/cost/observability checks do not engage. Per the overlay's ANTI-FP rule, not-applicable for non-infra tickets. No findings for this pass.
